creator: stoa@gmx.us
text: I have the same problem, however, I noticed the issue after installing patch-1 to a 10.1-RELEASE box that had been previously (weeks before) upgraded from 10.0-RELEASE.  I'm using UFS, not ZFS.  More confounding, it doesn't always happen, but I haven't been able to pin down the trigger.  As with others above, this issue only presents on one of two very similar installs (while the installs are very similar, the hardware is different, but both are amd64.)
